tasks.label: git-force-push
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'chore: update tasks.json' && git push --force-with-lease origin copilot/feattask-046-multi-farm-clean

tasks.label: check-main-iappdbcontext
tasks.command: git fetch origin main && git show origin/main:src/AgroPlatform.Application/Common/Interfaces/IAppDbContext.cs | head -15

tasks.label: git-status-diff
tasks.command: git status && echo '---DIFF---' && git diff HEAD --stat

tasks.label: git-merge-main
tasks.command: git fetch origin main && git merge --no-edit origin/main || true && git status --short

tasks.label: git-commit-merge-push
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'merge: resolve conflicts with main for PR #395' && git push origin copilot/feattask-046-multi-farm-clean

tasks.label: git-fixup-push
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'fix: CI errors - remove bad DTOs using, fix any types, ApiKey TenantId new keyword, AuditEntry string UserId, EF Core usings' && git push origin copilot/feattask-046-multi-farm-clean

tasks.label: git-sync-main-create-phase3-branch
tasks.command: git fetch origin main && git checkout main && git pull --ff-only origin main && git checkout -B phase3-audit-attachments

tasks.label: ef-add-phase3-migration
tasks.command: dotnet ef migrations add AddAuditDiffsAndAttachments --project src/AgroPlatform.Infrastructure --startup-project src/AgroPlatform.Api --output-dir Persistence/Migrations

tasks.label: git-commit-push-phase3
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'feat: add audit diffs and attachments' && git push -u origin phase3-audit-attachments

tasks.label: gh-create-phase3-pr
tasks.command:
gh pr create --base main --head phase3-audit-attachments --title "Phase 3A: enrich audit history with before/after values and add attachment support" --body $'## Summary
- add structured audit diffs with explicit oldValues, newValues and affectedColumns in the API and UI
- add a tenant-scoped Attachment entity with upload/list/download endpoints
- store files on the local filesystem under a structured tenant/entity path rooted at AttachmentStorage:RootPath or the app App_Data/attachments fallback

## Implementation notes
- audit diffs are captured in the EF save interceptor from modified properties and exposed as before/after payloads plus affected column names
- attachments are stored outside the database and linked by relative storage path per tenant, entity type and entity id'
